text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out shopping with Mejiro Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a message from Dober. I wonder what she
wants...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She says she's nervous about appearing on TV
and isn't sure if she's going to be able to speak
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Dober's recording today! I wish
she'd said something sooner, that workaholic!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer! I've gotta g—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Again? She must really be freaking out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh. Actually, this time it's from Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She fell asleep on the train and has no idea where
she is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Why's everything gotta happen all at once?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I dunno what to do. It might be a bit
dangerous to leave Bright on her own...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But I can't just ignore Dober either!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer starts panicking. It might be better
if I jump in and make the decision for her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But... what about Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, I got it! I'm pretty sure Ardan's free today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Hello? Ardan? Have you heard from Bright?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we hurry to the TV station to help Mejiro
Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I think we made it in time for the recording.
Now, where is she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
P-Palmer! I can't believe you actually came...
Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd be okay by myself, but once I
actually got here, I just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I totally get it! I get mad nervous too, to
tell you the truth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I always worry about saying something
super weird or not being able to explain myself
properly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But it always works out in the end! The
interviewer's a pro, and it's not like it's live or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ah... yeah. That makes sense. I just need to stay
calm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks... I feel like I can do it now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah? That's great! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
A red light! Heh... This really isn't the time for
this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Another red light?! Luck is not on our side today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Again?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I dunno if we're gonna make it in time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take the Umamusume lane! Sorry,
Trainer, but thanks for coming this far with me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But... what about Dober?
choice_data_list: Can you ask Ryan to help?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yeah! I completely forgot about Ryan, haha. I
think Dober likes her more, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, let me just message Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we hurry to the station where Mejiro
Bright is waiting!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Palmer! You really came for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're all right, you big space cadet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But at least you didn't end up as far away as that
one time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Which time was that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know, when you ended up in Aomori. Ardan
called me, and it took us hours to go get you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh right... Hehe. I almost forgot about that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I won't wander off that far again, though. I'm
more grown up now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Although, that's kind of sad too, in
its own way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That whole rescue mission ended up feeling kinda
like we were all on a trip. It was kinda fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we need to get on the train after this next
one. We can relax for a minute.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Look at all these people. I wonder what's going
on.

text_block_list.name: Station Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Attention, passengers. Due to an event on board,
the arrival of the next train has been delayed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh... Looks like it's gonna be a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I guess we could call a cab, but I could
probably just run the rest of the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go on ahead, Trainer. Thanks for
coming this far with me!
